Madhya Pradesh Bachelor of Arts Entrance.official_note: Official MP Dept. of Higher Education ePravesh admission portal; UG (BA) admission is merit-based, provisional merit lists and seat allotment are published here. Replaces the prior third-party Shiksha link. Merit lists/allotment letters are login-gated PDFs (per-candidate), so no public college-wise cutoff table is exposed.

Madhya Pradesh Bachelor of Business Admi.official_note: Same official MP ePravesh portal; BBA UG admission is merit-based with provisional merit lists/allotment published here. Replaces the prior third-party Shiksha link. Allotment/merit data is behind student login, no public cutoff table.

Madhya Pradesh Pre Engineering Test.official_note: Official DTE MP (MPOnline) year-wise cutoff utility for engineering/pharmacy/diploma counselling (admission now JEE-Main based via DTE). Page loaded; it is an ASP.NET filter form (course/institute/branch/category) that renders opening/closing ranks only after selecting filters, so no static rows are extractable. More specific than the prior generic dte.mponline.gov.in/portal/ link.

Madhya Pradesh Pre Nursing Selection Tes.official_note: Official MP Employees Selection Board (ESB) result page for PNST/GNMTST 2025 (esb.mp.gov.in domain, from official search result). Could not WebFetch-verify (server TLS certificate chain error), but it is the authoritative ESB result/merit portal. Results are per-candidate scorecards via roll-no/DOB lookup; no public college-wise cutoff table.

Madhya Pradesh Pre Veterinary and Fisher.official_note: Official MP ESB PV&FT result/merit page (esb.mp.gov.in domain, year 2022 result archive; RESULT_21 also exists). Could not WebFetch-verify due to ESB TLS certificate error, but it is the authoritative ESB result portal. Per-candidate result lookup, no public college-wise cutoff table.

Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda.official_note: Official MSU Baroda Faculty of Fine Arts page; admission is via programme-specific entrance tests and merit/provisional admission lists are posted here (e.g. Accessory Design merit list 2026-27). Could not WebFetch-verify (msubaroda.ac.in TLS certificate chain error), but confirmed via search as the official FFA site. Merit lists are notice PDFs, no structured cutoff rank table.

Maharashtra Bachelor of Science Nursing.official_note: Official Maharashtra CET Cell BSc Nursing CAP 2024 cutoff PDF (medical2024.mahacet.org, the CET Cell counselling domain); general live cutoff portal is https://cetcell.mahacet.org/cutoff-explorer/. WebFetch returned 403 for both (anti-bot), but these are the authoritative CET Cell sources. already_has_data is true, so extraction skipped.
